results.title: India beat New Zealand to lift the FIH Women’s Nations Cup
results.description: Navneet Kaur and Sunelita Toppo scored in the first quarter to help India to a 2-0 win and earn promotion back to Hockey Pro League.

results.title: Paris Saint Germain expected to make bid for Yan Diomande
results.description: Yan Diomande has been linked with a move to Manchester United this summer with the winger emerging as one of the club’s primary targets. The Ivory Coast international, currently playing at the World Cup in North America, scored 12 goals and provided eight assists in the Bundesliga last season for RB Leipzig.

results.title: Tunisia exit World Cup after 4-0 rout against Japan
results.description: Tunisia conceded nine goals in their first two games after being thrashed 5-1 by Sweden in the opener.
